title: Foveon – Bayer to Foveon X3, learned, Mac App using deep learning
abstract: Tired of the murky colors in your smartphone photos? Foveon is here to save the day! This Mac App uses deep learning to transform your images from "Bayer maze" into vibrant "Foveon X3". Say goodbye to模糊不清 and hello to a colorful world. Give it a try!
abstract_zh: 你还在为手机照片的斑驳色彩头疼吗？别担心，Foveon来帮忙了！这款Mac App能把你拍的照片从“Bayer迷宫”中解救出来，直接还原成清晰、艳丽的“Foveon X3”。用深度学习技术，告别模糊不清，还你一个色彩斑斓的世界。快来试试吧！
